summary: Kang Hyunwoo arrives in New York for a Nike-sponsored event, deciding to keep his identity hidden by wearing a mask. The party attracts numerous high-profile figures and celebrities, including Reyna, Mascherano, and the heir Mason Rommel, all of whom seem connected to Hyunwoo. Amidst the chaos and public attention, Hyunwoo pulls Mason aside to discuss a secret proposal regarding reaching the top of the Arena.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo arrives in New York and decides to wear a mask to the Nike party to maintain anonymity.
Various famous figures and athletes gather at the party, revealing deep connections to the 'Alley Boss'.
Hyunwoo meets with Mason Rommel to discuss a secretive proposal about reaching the top of the Arena.
